    Removes a specified number of garbage lines from the queue (for countering).

    Resets all game states to initial values.

    Resets score, level, and lines labels to default values.
    resetMultiplayerTimer() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.TimerManager
    Resets the multiplayer timer (stops and resets elapsed time to 0).
    resetSinglePlayerTimer() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.TimerManager
    Resets the single player timer (stops and resets elapsed time to 0).
    restartMultiplayerGame() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameStateManager
    Restarts a multiplayer game.
    restartMultiplayerGame() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.MultiplayerViewManager
    Restarts the multiplayer game.
    resumeMultiplayerTimer() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.TimerManager
    Resumes the multiplayer timer.
    resumeSinglePlayerTimer() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.TimerManager
